name: docex
description: LaTeX for .docx -- edit Word documents with code, convert to/from plain text .dex format
author: Fabio Votta

skills.name: docex
skills.description: Use when editing, creating, or manipulating .docx files. Covers text replacement, tracked changes, comments, figures, tables, citations, journal formatting, submission validation, and the .dex plain-text format. Use when user says 'edit the docx', 'add a comment', 'replace text', 'tracked changes', 'format for journal', 'decompile to dex', 'build from dex', or any .docx modification.
